nodes.name: __init__.py (commands)
nodes.summary: Package init for the Archon CLI commands subpackage.

nodes.name: __init__.py (core)
nodes.summary: Package init for the Archon core subpackage.

nodes.name: agent_mcp.py
nodes.summary: Archon v3 agent/skill/MCP expansion providing deterministic routing and trust: agent capability profiles, signed skill manifest checks, and MCP connector manager with trust tiers.

nodes.name: artifact_validator.py
nodes.summary: Validates pipeline step output artifacts by checking file existence, required markdown sections, minimum content length, schema compliance, and compliance score thresholds.

nodes.name: design_spec.py
nodes.summary: Typed input validator DesignSpec for the Archon design agent, using stdlib dataclasses to validate component, mode, tokens, constraints, and target fields.

nodes.name: migration.py
nodes.summary: Archon v3 migration runner and release gate validator with dry-run diff support, remediation output, and release gates for validation, security, context-integrity, and docs readiness.

nodes.name: pipeline_engine.py
nodes.summary: Core pipeline state machine executor for Archon, handling step execution, available-when conditions, synapse firing, artifact validation, resume logic with full guardrail parity.

nodes.name: policy_engine.py
nodes.summary: Central policy engine for tool, hook, and permission decisions, producing machine-readable PolicyDecision artifacts with rationale for every allow/deny/escalate outcome.

nodes.name: schema_validator.py
nodes.summary: Validates Archon v3 YAML schema contracts, linting required fields, enum values, pattern constraints, and detecting contradictory state transitions.

nodes.name: session_manager.py
nodes.summary: Archon v3 session lifecycle orchestration with enforced state machine (CREATED→ACTIVE→IDLE→ARCHIVED), restart/recovery policies, and correlation ID linking to pipeline traces.

nodes.name: skill_mcp_schema.py
nodes.summary: Converts Archon skill YAML manifests into MCP tool definitions, synthesizing inputSchema from triggers.keywords and surfacing output-schema in annotations.outputSchema.

nodes.name: synapse_engine_v2.py
nodes.summary: Production synapse execution engine (v2 is canon) with OWASP A1-A10 pattern detection (13 patterns), CRITICAL→HALT and HIGH/MEDIUM→WARN tier mapping.

nodes.name: synapse_engine.py
nodes.summary: Legacy v1 synapse engine preserved for compatibility; production code uses synapse_engine_v2.py.

nodes.name: synapse_hardener.py
nodes.summary: Hardening layer for Archon synapses implementing CircuitBreaker (CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN), RetryPolicy with exponential backoff, and GracefulDegrader for safe fallback decisions.

nodes.name: synapse_router.py
nodes.summary: Auto-selects synapses by complexity tier and lifecycle phase using a routing table (pre-execution, post-build, post-handoff, post-cycle), computing hash-based cache keys.

nodes.name: telemetry.py
nodes.summary: Archon v3 telemetry providing versioned TelemetryEnvelope (schema 3.0.0) for all runtime events, enabling replay, observability, and audit across session, tool, policy, and hook events.

nodes.name: __init__.py (utils)
nodes.summary: Package init for the Archon utilities subpackage.

nodes.name: stress_test_fixed.py
nodes.summary: Fixed variant of the file-ops MCP server stress test, performing sequential multi-line edits, atomic batch operations, and content integrity verification after each operation.

nodes.name: stress_test.py
nodes.summary: Maximal load test for the file-ops MCP server creating large files, running 10 sequential edits, atomic batch ops, and SHA-256 integrity verification.

nodes.name: _template synapse manifest
nodes.summary: Template manifest for creating new Archon synapses, defining required fields, activation conditions, and check patterns.

nodes.name: _template SYNAPSE.md
nodes.summary: Template documentation for creating new Archon synapses, covering activation conditions, check implementation patterns, and integration points.

nodes.name: anti-rationalization synapse manifest
nodes.summary: Manifest for the anti-rationalization synapse activating at MODERATE+ tiers to prevent 10 Iron Laws violations such as cutting corners and skipping validations.

nodes.name: anti-rationalization SYNAPSE.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive synapse documentation for the anti-rationalization synapse defining 10 Iron Laws that prevent cognitive shortcuts, false assumptions, and validation bypasses.

nodes.name: metacognition synapse manifest
nodes.summary: Manifest for the metacognition synapse activating at MODERATE+ tiers to enforce planning before action, confidence monitoring, and quality reflection.

nodes.name: metacognition SYNAPSE.md
nodes.summary: Extensive synapse documentation for metacognition covering plan-before-act protocol, confidence monitoring, reflection phases, and self-correction triggers.

nodes.name: AgentCapabilityProfile (class)
nodes.summary: Dataclass defining an agent's runtime capability profile including allowed modes, skills, guardrails, concurrency limits, and trust tier.

nodes.name: ValidationResult (class)
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing the result of artifact validation with passed flag, check list, errors, warnings, and compliance score.

nodes.name: PolicyDecision (class)
nodes.summary: Immutable dataclass for policy decision artifacts capturing action (allow/deny/escalate), rationale, policy ID, and correlation metadata.

nodes.name: SessionStatus (enum)
nodes.summary: Enum defining session lifecycle states: CREATED, ACTIVE, WAITING_TOOL, WAITING_PERMISSION, IDLE, RECOVERING, ARCHIVED, ERROR.

nodes.name: TelemetryEnvelope (class)
nodes.summary: Versioned telemetry envelope (schema 3.0.0) normalizing all runtime events for replay, observability, and audit.

nodes.name: CircuitBreaker (class)
nodes.summary: Per-synapse circuit breaker with CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN states, configurable failure threshold, recovery timeout, and success threshold.

nodes.name: DesignSpec (class)
nodes.summary: Validated input contract dataclass for design agent invocations with modes: generate, apply, audit, tokens, adapt.
